AP0bd663ed.stmt: Avoid assuming search tool malfunction from zero results on specific queries; this often reflects query precision rather than data absence or system error.
AP0bd663ed.why: Observations highlight zero results for niche terms but functionality confirmed via broader searches and direct queries, trapping assumptions of breakdown without evidence.

APfe96402c.stmt: Avoid assuming direct equivalence between cultural aesthetic concepts like Japanese mono no aware and Thai interpretations of impermanence without corpus-specific evidence.
APfe96402c.why: Recent observations identify smuggled assumptions equating these concepts, leading to flawed cross-cultural analyses of ephemerality in natural themes.
APfe96402c.trap: When comparing philosophical or aesthetic responses to natural phenomena across Asian cultures in social media corpora

APaddfe61a.stmt: Avoid assuming equivalence between Japanese mono no aware and Hungarian romantic expressions of impermanence (e.g., in Petőfi's literature) without corpus-specific evidence.
APaddfe61a.why: Recent counterevidence highlights distinct cultural manifestations, trapping analyses into flawed equivalences similar to Thai-Japanese assumptions.
APaddfe61a.trap: Cross-cultural comparisons of ephemerality in European and East Asian literatures
